mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY SET admin_reply = #{admin_reply}, status = #{status}, answered_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiry_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM FAQ
AND category = #{category}
AND (question LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR answer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY order_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAQ ( faq_id, admin_id, question, answer, category, order_no, visible, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( faq_seq.nextval, #{admin_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{question, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{answer, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{order_no, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{visible, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT faq_id, admin_id, question, answer, category, order_no, visible, created_at, updated_at FROM FAQ WHERE faq_id = #{faq_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE FAQ SET category = #{category}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, order_no = #{order_no}, visible = #{visible}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE faq_id = #{faq_id}
